inputs.label: Orientation Score
inputs.businessContext: Score for orientation to time and place (0-10 points)

inputs.label: Registration Score
inputs.businessContext: Score for registration of three words (0-3 points)

inputs.label: Attention and Calculation Score
inputs.businessContext: Score for attention and calculation (serial sevens or spelling backwards) (0-5 points)

inputs.label: Recall Score
inputs.businessContext: Score for delayed recall of three words (0-3 points)

inputs.label: Language Score
inputs.businessContext: Score for language tasks including naming, repetition, comprehension, reading, writing, and drawing (0-9 points)
